description_long: This object is a classic hot dog featuring a plump sausage nestled inside a soft, slightly browned bun. The sausage is topped with a generous squiggle of yellow mustard, which is evenly distributed along its length. The bun appears fluffy and lightly toasted, with a smooth, rounded exterior and a subtle gradient of color from light tan to golden brown. The sausage is a rich reddish-brown, contrasting with the lighter bun and the bright yellow of the mustard. There are no visible grill marks or additional condiments, and the hot dog is unwrapped, with no packaging present. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a street food hot dog found in urban parks or at food stands.
description: A plump sausage in a soft, golden-brown bun, topped with a squiggle of yellow mustard and no visible packaging.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hot dog, with the bun and mustard-topped sausage clearly visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the sausage and mustard, with the bun partially open and the sausage fully exposed.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the bun and sausage with mustard from the other side.
description_view_3: Top-down view similar to view 1, with the sausage and mustard in clear focus and the bun open around the sausage.
